subject: fix(map): theme-reactive tile style, DIN Pro Light, always-visible labels, no shadow
body:
Four map marker improvements:

1. Map tiles now switch between dark-v11 and light-v11 when user toggles
   theme (was stuck on dark — used system prefers-color-scheme instead
   of app isDark state). setStyle() re-adds source + layers after swap.

2. Font changed from DIN Pro Medium/Bold to DIN Pro Light for both
   cluster counts and station price labels — lighter, cleaner look.

3. Station price labels no longer vanish when overlapping. Changed
   text-allow-overlap to true, removed text-optional and
   text-ignore-placement — prices always visible.

4. Removed SHADOW_SM from native station markers — web markers can't
   have shadows (GPU layers), so removing from native for consistency.

Tags: map, theme, ui, consistency
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: map
Semver: minor
